scripts.generate:contracts: sh -c 'set -eu; mode_args=""; builddir="${INFERNIX_CABAL_BUILDDIR:-../.build/cabal}"; if [ "${INFERNIX_RUNTIME_MODE:-}" != "" ]; then mode_args="--runtime-mode $INFERNIX_RUNTIME_MODE"; fi; cabal --builddir="$builddir" run exe:infernix -- $mode_args internal generate-purs-contracts ./src'
scripts.build:purs: sh -c 'set -eu; rm -rf dist; mkdir -p dist; cp src/index.html dist/index.html; npm exec spago build; npm exec -- spago bundle --module Main --outfile dist/app.js --platform browser --bundle-type app --force'
scripts.build: npm run generate:contracts && npm run build:purs
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && npm exec spago test
